title: About ML + Physics notebook.
content:
Hi everyone, I hope you're enjoying the competition.

Yet I have a question concerning this notebook. I want to be sure that I understand. If there is no common well between train and test, what is the interest of the physical model function in the prediction loop ?

@aidensong123 @all

Best,

Ulrich

comments.content:
If there is no common well between train and test

between train and public test. Anyway it doesn't hurt.
